states.name: Dark Gawain
states.title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
states.description: When the power of the Last Faerie of Avalon warped Gawain's soul, the loyalty she had once had for King Arthur, but thought long gone, reawakened. That loyalty turned into blind faith, and anyone who opposed the king became her mortal enemy.

states.name: Dark Gawain
states.title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
states.description: Arthur Leidram wasn't Gawain's king anymore, she was a mass murderer—and yet, some part of Gawain must have still wanted to believe in her. It was hard to accept the fact that the ruler she once knew—noble and ready to risk her life for the people of Camelot—was just an act all along.

states.name: Dark Gawain
states.title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
states.description: Gawain was anxious about becoming the king's regent—she didn't feel she had the charisma or strength needed for the role. But she was alone in that judgment. The rest of the Round Table and the people of Camelot loved her, captured by her kind and honest nature.
